item.title: Censorship fascists are a problem
item.description:
"The Debian Publicity Team will no longer post on X/Twitter. We took this decision since we feel X doesn't reflect Debian shared values as stated in our social contract, code of conduct and diversity statement. X evolved into a place where people we care about don't feel safe." 2025-01-30

This is pretty interesting to see from a distro that was pretty focused on freedom. They no longer care about freedom of speech. Well, they still have it as of today, but they encourage people to use platforms that censor people over using slurs and create echo chambers, just so a single person doesn't get insulted by a stupid post outside of their page. This doesn't make any slightest sense, because if someone is already on twitter, they must feel very safe on musk's platform.

This freedom of speech will be slowly eroding with people that have a problem with facing a different opinion. Unfortunately, by promoting censorship you don't have control over who will be censored in next 10-20 years, when the government changes.

Your only hope is to be political majority during that time when we finally get rid of free speech, otherwise the elected party will get rid of you in one way or another. They can kill yourself with enough money. You should still remember that SJWs and communists are not a majority in broader society and you might literally censor yourself, not normies, by these stupid actions.

Everyone seems to support free speech until their feelings get hurt.

I'm not "anti-woke", but when i see someone demand censorship, i always know they're not right, otherwise censorship would be unnecessary for their opinions to shine.

Personally i think these social media pages are useless for the most part, but it's a moment like that when you can check what values are driving your project.

It's not rare for people to treat libre software as just another brand that is more convenient and ignore the philosophy.

It's just another brand of coke for some people.

Have you seen Richard Stallman "cancel" or ban someone on a mailing list over their tweets from 10 years ago? LOL

Content preservation

This is always a difficult one. I don't think most of the art and written text actually survived to modern times. Many contemporary big artists died poor or pretty unpopular.

Now we live in a different world. They tell you that noting disappears from the internet, but it's only true if someone downloaded it or shared it on a different service. Otherwise, it's actually pretty common for some less known content to be unavailable.

Now imagine getting cancelled retroactively for saying some word or being banned from most places for having a generic opinion that becomes ILLEGAL in 20-30 years? Or someone revealing that you said N-word as a teen, and then your entire career falls to dust? I think it's funny. It's like a reverse of these previously unknown artists.

Mentions of Notch from minecraft were removed for his online posts, but have you seen what kinds of crazy things he have posted on twitter to get banned as a creator of the game?

"It's ok to be white"
"There clearly is an agenda against white men"
"Nazis and communists are bad"

And even if notch is a ""nazi"", then you are playing a game made by a nazi and you don't see a problem with it. You are literally nazi.

item.title: Copyright sucks!
item.description:
I’m against copyright and patents. It artificially produces worthless slop and leads to socialism or oligarchy, depending on whether the government chooses to fix monopoly every 5 years. It’s also against free speech.

Oh, do you want your content to be “stolen”?

I don’t have a say in that. Copyright protection isn’t protection, it doesn’t work anyway, it’s just an annoyance. If you don’t hate me you will probably add some attribution, but you’re not getting raided if you don’t.
I also don’t have time to care about that.

Trolls

On youtube there have been people exploiting the automatic system and making money on it. It’s not sustainable.

There are many trolls that hold rights to works they don’t distribute, but sue people to earn money.

Poor creators

Most writers and other creators have given away rights to publishers, so it’s the poor small publishers that need money for bread, LMAO.

Before copyright there were many great works, and also copyright extends beyond the life of the author. Do you believe in afterlife? Copyright respects that.

DRM

https://defectivebydesign.org

DRM treats you like cattle or product.

Creepy patents

Many patents have Ted K vibes or are simply creepy.

https://patents.google.com/patent/US8246454B2/en

“Yelling “McDonalds!” to end a television commercial for the fast-food restaurant is just one example of many “interactive commercials” contained within this patent.”

https://x.com/u_m_a_m_i/status/1612572153563566090

BTW this is discriminatory of people on wheelchair and mute people. It’s not that important, but for a large company it’s silly.

item.title: Luke smith review lol
item.description:
having rules

He stopped recording in 2023 when going to south-east europe, to go be an orthodox and follow his rules.

But then despite talking about privacy, he promotes a VPS and DNS registrar that ask you for personal information when creating an account. Only because he has a deal for referral URLs. Maybe some rules are more important than other.

I find it weird how much he applies his situation on everyone else. He says something along the lines that everyone should have a website, but then recommends these privacy invasive services, that are not a problem for him because he's a public figure, but wouldn't be normal for 99% of people.

First of all, domain names are mainly built for companies. Do you know how much it costs for something seemingly so simple? Around 10$ on most registrars for .org or similar. It's retarded.

You don't "own" the domain. You rent it. And you will be happy. You will be happier than with tor.

Almost like if DNS was made by world economic forum

Yes, i know it's like land, property is more like ownership but still has tax, but almost everyone needs land while DNS was simply made for companies and bigger sites, and not people.

Meanwhile, there is a way of fully owning your domain with tor or i2p, that is just for leet hackers and not for normies. This is stupid.

Peertube vs Odysee/LBRY

Peertube is similar to odysee if you understand both systems.
Peertube is more independent, and it's more proven to work with multiple whole independent instances more similar to youtube and fediverse, while odysee is more similar to bittorrent file sharing with a cryptocurrency frontend.

VPS isn't something special that can't be censored by the owner, the reason it is recommended for when censorship might happen is that there is money incentive and there are only a few types of VPS and every is compatible to another and can be quickly moved or replaced on free market.
While LBRY is a custom system that might suck when odysee company would stop running or start doing bad things, we don't know. It might be a waste of time and you can't immediately switch to a different VPS.
You can seed/host your content on LBRY additionally, so it's not even close to a youtube clone.

Well, you can say that odysee is worse just because newpipe doesn't support it, and it's such a good app.

And with fediverse, for example mastodon is more woke and pro-censorship than X. It doesn't matter that it's an open system, mastodon server uses so much resources that it's not realistic to host it on a VPS for personal needs. So you're better on X. And you're the healthiest without any social media anyway.

"I will be throwing away my computers"

"What is the computer that i should get that solves all of my problems"

Get a new or used desktop, nigga

Every single problem i heard from luke about new laptops is fixed by desktops.
I haven't heard a single person say to me that they don't like desktops. I'm a young 🇷🇺Z🇷🇺 oomer and we're desktopchads, at least the people around me.

Also i hope he seeds torrents on that VPS, since he doesn't have the hardware to do it at home, and i know how slow the internet can be in countryside, so i understand that one.
You already know what i think about leechers.

If he doesn't, i will report it to santa so he knows to not come to that house lol.

Raspberry Pi

Raspberry Pi is a microcomputer that is as cheap as these 200$ used laptops and it's extensible and it probably doesn't have something like IME. Additionally uses much less power by itself. It's not all free software but it's good.

Nothing personal

I didn't invent this because i didn't like him or something, i just see that he doesn't know anything about IT or electronic engineering so you might make a stupid decision because the unaboomer said so. I'm pretty sure it affected some people, even including me in the way that i was encouraged only to buy used laptops and i didn't knew about used desktops being popular back then.

There are literally people that prefer to buy a newer thinkpad just for the meme, than an older dell or toshiba that is pretty similar to old thinkpads.

I think many videos he did are nice, but there are also really stupid ones.

item.title: Mastodon is no good
item.description:
If you want to try out fediverse, be prepared to spend a big sum on hosting and domain name, or don't expect any freedom. And remember to be a good boy and put your personal information when renting an overpriced domain name. See more about how much it sucks

And the maintainer of a server needs control over what is posted, but i assume you make a switch to have freedom, and you don't get it on 99% of providers. Freedom is not for normies, otherwise there wouldn't be this fight for basic rights.

Mastodon is meant to be federated, but is it easy to host it yourself? Not for personal use. And really, it doesn't scale well, but i guess it can't scale well, because you have to moderate everything, otherwise you will get defederated from most instances.

I don't like depending on some people being nice, but social media largely depends on networking effect. Are the most people on mastodon friendly or reasonable? If not, then why spend time with them.

item.title: Overpopulation
item.description:
Hey, a reminder that in europe there isn't a problem strictly with not enough people, but with the fact that whites live too long(old population) and want to get paid too much, so big corporations want cheaper workers. Many countries are growing, but not in number of people.

https://web.archive.org/web/20250222200444/https://wageindicator.org/labour-laws/platformeconomy/platform-workers-news/january-2023-spain-false-self-employed-and-immigrants-without-work-permits-glovo-fined-56-7-million-euros

It's normal to notice that something is wrong, but we don't have a mass of abandoned homes because no one wants to buy them, it's the opposite. There are more unused places, but it's stupid not to notice other changes besides number of people.

But when someone concerned about climate

item.title: Vegans
item.description:
Vegans

How did we get there?

In 20th century there were many experimental diets, as knowledge in nutrition increased. Also at this time people outside of cities were tricked into buying much more sugar to be "equal" with urban areas, presenting sugar AS AN IMPORTANT NUTRITION FOR CHILDREN in some cases...

In second half of century, we already had veganism, fruit diets, fasting diets, cleansing scam diets, low fat diets. And still, the myth of sugar was better than ever. Later, people were fed with concentration camp/african fashion(ultra skinny) so it fits together.

One of the more succesful diets, veganism, carries something that other diets don't have, which is leftist "morality", so trendy after 70s in tandem with environmentalism. Veganism is also very expansive, because it applies to not using any animal products, and not killing or owning any animals. Though it is unclear which farm animals are OK to keep, and which are BAD. I think if you keep them indoors at house, it's all fine, but if they walk around your house it's evil.

It's a big deal, because if you own a cat, it eats mice, hamsters and moles. If you own a bigger dog, it often kills rats that could be someone's pet, and sometimes mauls a kid depending on breed.

Human is just an animal, yet "All animals are equal, but some animals are more equal than others". So, animals are smart enough to have suicidal thoughts and feel love, but not enough to stop killing other animals for fun, not even for food? Rules for thee but not for me.

Now, without mocking vegans. Actually the reason why they hate farm animals is because there are a bunch of industrial farms with bad conditions for animals. And most lefists don't recognize difference between responsible farms.

Popularity

At this time cars were very popular in rich countries, and everyone was already brainwashed with sugar, giving their children the best they can(coke and sweets), and getting fat. Being super skinny became a fashion, and the ultimate health state normies can get, that is not being ultra fat. And conveniently, vegan diet was seen as "fit", low fat, low calorie, so it only gained more popularity for normies not interested in moral aspect.

On the other hand the moral part of vegans was supercharged by bambi(1942) being shown to children and showing that human bad, and apparently animals have families and love...

It has environmetalist an moral arguments, and sometimes alleged health related benefits. But all major problems that we have are man-made. Veganism is advertised as a cure for obesity and moral problems of industrial farming and lack of real hunting, but it was created by the same city slickers that can't bother with living outside of dystopia. But now that it was created, we should think about not killing a big part of nature(people) by removing these farms.

Vegans try to prove that their diet isn't inferior by using old methods of measuring nutrition, that also makes eggs and their cholesterol look unhealthy, and fat being worse than sugar. Dairy products are healthy and everyone knows that, but oh noooo they contain satoorated fats! Even if you don't drink milk like a real european, almost everything contains something derived from cow milk. If you can't breast feed, guess what.

Leftism and its short reach(has been a disaster for the human race)

If you think about it, it's kinda crazy because there many countries in which it is common to eat dogs and cats, or torture them and upload it to internet, but nobody cares.

But if you think longer, it makes sense. Leftists fight for liberties and "moral" changes only in western countries, where everything is established and conditions are better than anywhere else in the world.

Even better! Americans are arguing whether fetus feels pain, but ignore that abot 90% of white newborns and babies in US are tortured and humiliated to follow barbaric jewish traditions for aesthetic reasons. There are many cases where babies die as a result, lose the rest of their reproductive parts, can't have sex, need later surgeries to correct "accidents" or later these adults kill themselves.

1. Making any meaningful change goes out the window.

Veganism is equal to banning all forestry just because some brazilian rainforest was cut down to grow your AVOCADO, which is very popular among vegans and other leftists. Also, cargo ships run diesel engine with extra cheap fuel similar to tar.

2. Environment goes out the window.

Vegans introduced "meat" replacements, which are plants with chemicals(usually causing cancer) that taste like meat. In simple terms, it's analogy to child sex dolls specially offered as prevention for PDF files to avoid abusing actual child.

3. Morality goes out the window.

"Not being vegan is nazi"

My honest reaction:

Scene from Inglourious Basterds (2009)

Veganism is horrible for the environment.

  • You can't use many natural materials: leather, wool, hair, bones etc. Instead, there are replacements made out of plastic, in case of leather, additionally this plastic is toxic(PU).
  • It's impossible to ban using animal products and production of plastics at the same time.
  • You can't hunt. It causes animals to not fear humans, and in result: boars cause massive losses in property, wolves become more violent, bears associate humans with free food and attack much often. In result, they often get shot in defense(of property or physical safety), or have to be hunted by order anyway. In cucked(urban) areas, boars get caught in cages and shipped to rural forests.
  • CO2 production. Wild animals produce co2. Deer have more violent life in natural environment, when getting killed by wild predator.
  • You can't feed animals with leftovers, everything goes to trash and to landfill instead of soil generator 2000.

Veganism is horrible for you.

  • You can't function without using multiple supplements, the food lacks good proteins and has too much fiber.
  • You can't eat with friends or family without being an idiot, and can barely get any food outside of hipster restaurants and stores. Everything has a premium price tag anyway.

I was tricked into being "fit", which is disturbingly reminiscent, almost vegetarianism lite, because you still can't eat too much of random things because of the same old bribed soyentists and have similar bugman outcome as vegans, though not as bad.

At this point traditional chinese medicine is better than western in many aspects.

OBVIOUSLY i'm not a doctor and pls don't sue me. You should take various health methods into account and be reasonable.

Thanks for coming to my Ted talk. Further read at luke smith's When you spend years with vegan liberals, this is what happens to the man.

item.title: Voting by religion
item.description:
My religion says slavery is good.
My religion says birth control is bad.
My religion says sex without procreation is bad.
My religion says you should get married and practice monogamy.
My religion says gay sex is bad.
My religion says killing people is bad.
My religion says lying is bad.

My religion doesn’t say who to vote for.

Oh! There’s an blue dude that wants to enforce all these rules in law. He also had 3 wives and isn’t able to cite a favorite verse from my sacred book. I personally don’t even follow many of these rules, but i’m going to vote for him.

item.title: Zionism
item.description:
You don’t need to dive deep to see

2023 - soyjak focus switches from ukraine to poor israel.
Palestinians are not saints, but i have a quote from Joker(2019).
You get what you fucking deserve.

US military aid

The reason why Trump asked for mineral resources in ukraine in exchange for further military help, but gives much more money to israel with no exchange, is because israel is an investment. The investment doesn’t even have to return, but there is always hope that Ben Gurion canal will be built on a shorter route. The shorter route goes through gaza. You might say that this is not the reason why someone would want to continue genocide in gaza. But this is the best case assuming that this is just for money and strategic interest in middle east.
I’m very happy to see that USA doesn’t actually protect democracy but its own ass.
Why whould they want to build this? Well, egypt has closed down suez canal many times, and even restricked israel’s ships from using it because of arab-israeli conflict. It would also be a benefit for israel. I can see where israel benefits, but i don’t see why all american presidents would support it with tax money. You are robbed by zionists.

Hypocrisy

If this is not the case, then this is a hate crime much bigger than holocaust. This is also a possibility, because jews hate many nations, accuse americans of being slave owners while having disproportionately big share in middle passage, since they were among european immigrants to america, accuse poles of running the concentration camps and holocaust and call white nationalists antisemites as a weapon, call everyone else in middle east terrorists despite being the biggest terrorist state in the world.

Many jews that never experienced any violence make money off holocaust and nazism. This is called holocaust industry.

Israel is not open for immigration. Despite being built on immigration from europe and america, and having very big share in lobbying multiculturalism in europe. Zionism is a nationalist movement.

Jews can easily go to each country and exploit it as they wish, but you can’t go to israel even if you’re an american and they’re your greatest ally.

Some people tried to associate some muslim terrorist groups with WTC attack, but the only terrorist organization linked to WTC is mossad. Search for dancing israelis.

And it is actually an insult to compare all jews to zionists. But the majority of jews and american shabbos goys support it.

World leaders supporting israel

If you have pictures with more politicians, please send them to me, so we as a community can also show support.

What’s wrong in these pictures? As far as i know, these people are not jews, spiritual or ethnic. They are shabbes goys. Most of them are christians(judeo-christians). They shouldn’t do that. Also why are these jews doing business with every politician? Is it a symbol of control in each country?
In some of these countries(poland, japan) there is barely any jewish minority.

109 Bars

If you get kicked out of 109 bars, is it the bars or your fault?

Jews were expelled from over 100 places in history, proving that they are unable to behave anywhere in the world.

The most were caused by single cases of ritual murder of non-jews.

Why are people becoming real antisemites?

There are 6 million reasons to be antisemitic

Lies.

The term itself is used incorrectly, it’s actually judeophobia. The word semite isn’t derived from jew, and doesn’t mean jew. But it was appropriated for jews, and for other middle eastern groups an incorrect “islamophobia” is used. This only speaks about the religion and not about race. You can say “jew” for both the religion and race because it’s a very ethnic religion that almost no one besides the jews believes in. But no, not all arabs are muslims. There are more christians in syria than in israel. And also there are muslims in many parts of the world, africa, asia, europe… You can’t have a basic conversation without explaining everything, because everything is full of lies.

The holocaust data is falsified and not backed by good evidence. It’s illegal in some countries to even utdermine it, so there can’t be a normal discussion, it fuels conspiracy theories. Many americans have a weird reflex of saying that only jews died in it.

Traditions

Many whites are disgusted by jews, because of their ritual animal murder, child abuse and mutilation that has spread to USA, stupid and generally ugly fashion and appearance and colonialism mixed with trying to avoid fighting for yourself because you study a religious book. And also a long history of being expelled from every country, for And cherry on top, threatening to go to another country because many of them have citizenship in 2 countries.

Repeating history

We will have some kind of new ideology in the following years because as people are growing tired of this. Maybe there needs to be a 110th bar.
